chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يَجُوزُ مِنْ شَهَادَةِ النِّسَاءِ وَ مَا لَا يَجُوزُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 13 – What is allowed from the testimony of the women, and what is not allowed

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (24/241)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (24/241)

parts.text: أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( صلوات الله عليه )

text: تَجُوزُ شَهَادَةُ النِّسَاءِ فِي الْعُذْرَةِ وَ كُلِّ عَيْبٍ لَا يَرَاهُ الرِّجَالُ .

en.hubeali: (It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said:’ The testimony of the women is allowed regarding (establishment of) the virginity, and every shame which the men cannot look at’.
en.sarwar: 7. Yunus has narrated from ‘Abd Allah ibn Bukayr who has narrated the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said testimony of women about virginity and every defect which men cannot look at is admissible.’”
